page_metadata.biotools__summary: A precision virtual crossmatch decision support system for interpretation of ambiguous molecular HLA typing data | VICTOR: VIrtual CrossmaTch for mOleculaR typing data | This prototype tool computes virtual crossmatch using the candidate’s unacceptable antigens including high resolution alleles and molecular HLA typing of the donor | Web services interface information for Transplanttoolbox
